subcodes.title: The Fifth Principle—The Abolition of Prejudices: Words spoken on 1911-11-13 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Another principle of the teaching of Baha'o'llah is this: That you must renounce all prejudices
subcodes.first_line_orig: از جمله اساس بهاء الله ترک تعصب وطنی و تعصب مذهبی و تعصب جنسی و تعصب سیاسی
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @oneness; unity of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @Judas
